name: Arctic Vigor
description:
This tattoo takes the shape of the face of a roaring polar bear with piercing, ice-blue eyes. You don't take damage from extreme cold or severe cold.

Activate 2 command

Frequency once per day

Effect You call forth a blast of polar wind in a within a range of 30 feet that deals |options:area-damage] damage. All creatures in the area must attempt a save.
